title: Refined Hypixel Skyblock (J.A.B.O.S.M.)
description: Just a bunch of Skyblock Mods
body:
Just a bunch of Skyblock Mods. Great for the perfect Hypixel Skyblock experience.

This modpack brings together all the essential tools you need for a smooth, efficient Hypixel Skyblock experience:

Included Mods & Key Features

REI (Roughly Enough Items): In-game recipe lookup, favorites tab, and full item details at your fingertips.

SBA (SkyBlock Addons) & Skyhanni: Comprehensive HUD overlays for collections, skills, dungeon stats, and timers; real-time alerts for pet cooldowns, daily tasks, and more. Fully customizable display with Skyhanni.

Skyblocker: Disable distracting block animations and particle effects so you can focus on island management. Plus a huge amount of features to completely personalise thence Skyblock experience

Sodium: High-performance graphics engine that boosts your FPS and stabilizes latency, even in crowded lobbies or complex builds.

Why Choose This Pack?

All-in-One: No more switching between chat commands or external sites—everything you need is preconfigured.

Optimal Performance: Enjoy buttery-smooth gameplay on both low-end and high-end systems.

Tailored Experience: Turn overlays and effects on or off to suit your playstyle.


Install JABOSM now and take control of your Skyblock journey with peak efficiency and performance!
